title: Google Slides API export
description: Add 'Export to Google Slides' functionality. User clicks export after conversation, structured outline gets created as a Google Slides presentation in their Drive. Uses existing Google OAuth via Supabase with added drive.file scope. Simplified v1: no token storage or refresh — re-auth if expired.
acceptance_criteria: User can click 'Export to Google Slides' and a presentation appears in their Google Drive
Presentation has correct slide titles and bullet point content from the outline
Uses drive.file scope (non-sensitive, no Google verification needed)
Graceful handling if provider_token is expired (prompt re-auth)
No raw Google tokens stored in database
